title: Screaming Sheep
description: Changes the sheep hurt and death sounds to more like the screaming sheep in A Minecraft Movie
body:
# Screaming Sheep
This pack changes the sheep hurt and death sounds to be more like the screaming sheep in A Minecraft Movie.

## Zombies Attack Pink Sheep datapack
This pack was created for the [Zombies Attack Pink Sheep datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/zombies-attack-pink-sheep), but can be used without. 

Video (Resource pack is near the end):
